shop.title: The Master Cut Catalog

productDetail.notFoundDesc: The prime cut or specialty item you are looking for is not in our active registry. It might be out of season.
productDetail.noTips: No preparation tips currently registered. This cut is best prepared simply to appreciate its natural quality.
productDetail.noNutrition: Detailed macro nutrition registry is currently processing for this specialty cut. Sourced raw and all-natural.
productDetail.noReviews: No customer reviews yet. Be the first to share your experience.
productDetail.reviewThanks: Thank you for sharing your experience. Your rating has been integrated into the average cut rating.
productDetail.commentPlaceholder: Describe the texture, marbling, freshness, or overall quality of this select cut...
productDetail.signInPrompt: Please sign in to your El Talkhawy account to record verified purchase reviews.

whyChooseUs.label: Our Promise
whyChooseUs.title: Why Customers Choose Us
whyChooseUs.description: We've been serving Egyptian families since 1985 — with the same commitment to quality, freshness, and trust.
